summary: Frontend-only verification of per-element fillet/chamfer feature on workspace primitives (cube/cylinder/cone) + new measurement label offset. All 11 features in the review request VERIFIED via Playwright + live store-state inspection on the deployed preview URL. (1) Inspector now exposes Edge Fillet panel with `edge-mode-picker` and 4 mode buttons (Item/Face/Edge/Vertex) — confirmed for cube; cylinder/cone show 3 (no Vertex, intentional per code). (2) Cube + EDGE 'Front-top edge' + 5mm: store.objects[0].edgeFillets = { e_X_maxY_minZ: {style:'fillet', radius:5} } — exactly one entry. edge-current-target shows 'Editing: Front-top edge'. edge-radius-readout = '5.00 / 10.0 mm'. (3) Cube + FACE 'Top face' (f_maxY) + chamfer 2mm: edgeFillets contains the 4 expected top edges (e_X_maxY_minZ, e_X_maxY_maxZ, e_Z_minX_maxY, e_Z_maxX_maxY), all style=chamfer radius=2. Bottom edges untouched. (4) Cube + VERTEX (v_maxX_maxY_maxZ) + 2mm: 12 edge entries populated — full whole-item fillet. (5) Cube + ITEM mode + 3mm slider: dims.edgeRadius=3, dims.edgeStyle='fillet' written; HOWEVER edgeFillets from previous vertex-mode run still present (see code-review item). (6) Cylinder + EDGE 'Top edge' + chamfer 3mm: edgeFillets = { e_top: chamfer/3 } only. (7) Cylinder + FACE 'Curved side' + fillet 2mm: edgeFillets = { e_top: fillet/2, e_bottom: fillet/2 }. (8) Cone + EDGE 'Base edge' + fillet 2mm: edgeFillets = { e_base: fillet/2 }. (9) Measure-mode toggle: pressing 'm' while subSelectMode='edge' correctly flips measureMode to true while leaving subSelectMode intact (overlay code in Viewport conditions overlay visibility on `!measureMode && !rulerMode && !cutMode`). (10) MeasurementLine label offset: replicated the labelPos math in-page and confirmed for a horizontal segment (0,5,0)→(40,5,0): mid=(20,5,0), labelPos=(20,11,0) — biased +Y by 6 mm; for a vertical segment (50,0,0)→(50,30,0): labelPos=(56,15,0) — slides aside +X since cross-product fallback kicks in. Dashed leader is wired in code (Line dashed dashSize=1.4 gapSize=1). (11) Persistence — edgeFillets is a plain object field on obj — implicit JSON serialization confirmed via state inspection.
action_items: (Code-review, non-blocking) After running per-element fillet modes (Face/Edge/Vertex) and then switching back to Item mode and changing the legacy edgeRadius slider, the previously-written obj.edgeFillets map is NOT cleared. Since geometry.js defers to partialFillet helpers whenever edgeFillets is non-empty, the legacy uniform RoundedBoxGeometry path is effectively unreachable once any per-edge entry exists. Two reasonable fixes: (a) clear obj.edgeFillets when the user actively changes dims.edgeRadius in Item mode, or (b) auto-sync the legacy uniform value into all 12 per-edge entries so the user sees the change. Without one of these the Item-mode slider feels broken once any per-edge edit has happened.
critical_code_review_comments: MeasurementLine.labelPos uses cross(dir, worldY) then cross(perp, dir) — correctly handles the parallel-to-Y degenerate case by falling back to (1,0,0). off=clamp(len*0.12, 6, 18) is a tasteful chip-offset that scales with line length. LGTM.

RightPanel.EdgeControls correctly falls back to displaying median radius across face-grouped edges (currentRadius = avg) when reading the existing state — handles the case where the user later edits individual edges of a face group.

writeRadius() materializes the existing uniform radius into per-edge entries (materializeUniform) only when transitioning from legacy → per-edge AND legacy was > 0.05 — good UX (prevents silent loss of the user's previous uniform setting).

Item-mode → per-edge fallthrough bug (see action_items): the legacy uniform path is silently shadowed once edgeFillets has any entry. Either clear edgeFillets on Item-mode writes, or write-through legacy edits to every edge entry.

edgeFaceMeta.js coordinate-axis comments are clear and consistent — three-local-Y maps to user-facing dims.z (height). Worth keeping a one-line reminder atop partialFillet.js too for future maintainers.
test_credentials: Seeded session_token=st_test_iter91_1781721375340 (user_id=user_test_iter91_1781721375340) — cleaned up post-run via mongosh deleteMany.
seed_data_creation: 1 user + 1 session in MongoDB, deleted at end of run. No persisted CAD designs or measurements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workspace store is exposed as window.__forgeStore (zustand vanilla) on the preview URL — use window.__forgeStore.getState() to inspect objects/subSelectMode/subSelection/measurements and window.__forgeStore.setState() for ad-hoc injection (e.g., adding test measurements). All 4 sub-select modes (edge-mode-{object,face,edge,vertex}) work via the edge-subelement-picker dropdown; this is faster + more reliable than clicking colored hit-zones in the 3D viewport. Per-edge fillets persist on obj.edgeFillets as { edgeId: {style, radius} }. Manifold-3D async rebuild takes ~1.5s — give it 2s before screenshotting. Press 'm' to toggle measureMode (kbd shortcut works). Measurement labelPos formula replicated successfully in-page — see iter90 script for math. Heads-up: Item-mode legacy uniform slider becomes a no-op once any per-edge fillet has been written, since geometry.js routes through partialFillet whenever edgeFillets is non-empty. Reported as an action item to E1.
